prevalence.trend: stable; increased risk with prosthetic valves and devices

burden.source: WHO Europe/IHME infectious and cardiovascular context

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Modified Duke criteria; blood cultures and echocardiography (TTE/TEE)

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Tens of thousands of cases annually across EU
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with early diagnosis and access to surgery

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: TEE and blood cultures widely available; multidisciplinary endocarditis teams in many centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Prolonged IV antibiotics; surgery for complications or prosthetic infection
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Complex care coordination and comorbidity management
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong cardiology and cardiac surgery networks
